regenerationNote: Report HTML + CSV regenerated 2026-06-14 from refreshed CelesTrak TLE (1258 loaded actors: 651 OneWeb LEO + 33 Galileo MEO + 574 GEO group; was 663). Mutually-visible selected-pair actor rows rose to 63 (visibility windows 64), driven by the GEO group growth (30 hand-curated -> 574 full geostationary catalog); TLE rows 3, requirement rows 34, station rows 2 unchanged. The prior 2026-06-13 regeneration applied public data-gap closure (TLE timestamp display, retained CWA local rain statistic, selected-pair Copernicus DEM elevation/terrain mask, S.1528/S.465 antenna modeling with assumed Tier-B parameters); those numeric changes (terrain thresholds, antenna off-axis derating) remain.

externalReconciliation.summary: Public-source reconciliation verifies or bounds selected-pair station values, recovers the Open-Elevation source method for legacy selected-pair elevation cache values, source tier, TLE/standards method, DEM/rain repair paths, and non-observable packet/RF claims.

supports: modeled selected-pair visibility, handover, and link-budget outputs
source class, source tier, and source gap disclosures
selected-pair Copernicus GLO-30 elevation comparison and retained terrain masks
retained public CWA local rain statistic and bounded 5 mm/h demo preset
standards-derived antenna-pattern model output with disclosed assumed Tier-B parameters
row-level CSV export for slide tables
doesNotSupport: packet-test latency, jitter, throughput, or loss
native RF handover or active serving route migration
surveyed RF horizon or full-registry DEM/terrain replacement
measured link-local weather, SANSA rainfall, scenario-window weather, or long-term R0.01 calibration
operator RF hardware truth for dish size, EIRP, polarization, beamwidth, or antenna pattern
external acceptance thresholds or final written acceptance

files.role: original smoke manifest copied from ignored output
public-source reconciliation and remaining gap register
retained Open-Elevation query response for selected-pair legacy elevation cache recovery
retained Copernicus GLO-30 selected-pair DEM comparison sample
retained Copernicus GLO-30 selected-pair terrain-mask sample and horizon algorithm output
retained local rain calibration repair-source candidates
retained public CWA local rain statistic mapped to a bounded 5 mm/h demo preset
